description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Dinit Meson based CI that runs when a PR has the 'meson' label or when something is pushed to master. The workflow should have three jobs: Debian-bookworm_build, MacOS-latest_build, and Alpine-latest_build. Each job should run on a different environment (Debian bookworm, macOS latest, and Alpine latest), setup meson, build, run unit tests and integration tests, and upload igr-tests output files on failure.
